mapper.update: update ticket set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, ticket_type, status, description, ticket_title, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from ticket where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from ticket where status = '等待用户回复' and is_deleted = 0 and create_user = #{userId}
select count(*) from ticket where (status = '等待客服回复' or status = '处理中' or status = '新建') and is_deleted = 0

select t.id, t.user_id, ticket_type, t.status, description, ticket_title, t.is_deleted, t.create_user, t.update_user, t.create_time, t.update_time from ticket t join ticket_main_text tmt on t.id = tmt.ticket_id join ticket_main_text_quote tmtq on tmt.id = tmtq.ticket_main_text_id where tmtq.id = #{quoteId} and tmtq.is_deleted = 0 and t.is_deleted = 0 and tmt.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into ticket(id, user_id, ticket_type, status, description, ticket_title, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{ticketType}, #{status}, #{description}, #{ticketTitle}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into ticket(id,user_id, ticket_type, status, description, ticket_title, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.ticketType}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.ticketTitle}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into ticket(id,user_id, ticket_type, status, description, ticket_title, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.ticketType}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.ticketTitle}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), ticket_type = values(ticket_type), status = values(status), description = values(description), ticket_title = values(ticket_title), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
